releases.introKey: AI posture analysis, morning briefings, RPE trend insights, an upgraded 3D muscle map, and smarter Watch workouts — DUNE now sees how you move.
Set-level RPE, stair climbing, VO2 Max tracking, workout rewards, and smarter sleep analysis — your fitness toolkit keeps growing.
Health Q&A, AI workout builder, sleep predictions, injury alerts, a 3D muscle map, and more — your training just got smarter.
Widgets, weather, coaching, sleep debt, cardio tracking, themes, and three languages — all in one update.
Track workouts, check your condition, and see your progress — all built around your body's data.
